data.name: Moonlight: Season One
data.detailed_description:
In the world of Moonlight, Neural Implants (NIs) have become an integral part of everyday life, granting instant access to all human knowledge and controlling everything from communication to personal data. A new app has taken society by storm, offering people the chance to escape into a virtual world while their AI-controlled bodies continue working in the real one. But not everyone is content with living under the influence of this technology.

You step into the role of a Detective, a weathered investigator haunted by personal loss, as you unravel the dark secrets behind a mysterious death. What begins as a routine case soon pulls you into a web of corruption, deceit, and sexual desire that blurs the line between dreams and reality.



Moonlight: Season One is a story-rich adult visual novel featuring hand-crafted animations, an original soundtrack that blends cinematic scoring with synthwave and retrowave influences, and deeply emotional storytelling. Expect complex characters, moral choices, and moments of both passion and heartbreak as you uncover the truth.
data.about_the_game:

Moonlight: Season One is a story-rich adult visual novel featuring hand-crafted animations, an original soundtrack that blends cinematic scoring with synthwave and retrowave influences, and deeply emotional storytelling. data.short_description: Neural Implants have redefined humanity, but a single death threatens to expose their darkest secret. Investigate, uncover, and survive in this adult visual novel of mystery, passion, and control.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD Dual Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Runs on most modern PCs.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHZ Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2500 MB 可用空間
